data.title: Audio Equipment Maker Sonos Slashes 12% Jobs - What's Going On?
data.description: Sonos announces a 12% workforce reduction as part of its restructuring plan aimed at improving operational efficiency. The company estimates restructuring costs of $15 million to $18 million.

data.title: What's Going On With FuelCell Energy Stock Thursday?
data.description: FuelCell Energy Inc (NASDAQ:FCEL) shares are trading higher. The company on Thursday announced that it began testing its electrolyzer for a potential commercial nuclear power opportunity.

data.title: IQVIA Delivers Solid Q4 Growth Despite 'Choppy' Market Conditions
data.description: IQVIA reaffirms its 2025 outlook, projecting up to $16.13 billion in revenue and EPS of $11.70-$12.10. Strong TAS growth and solid R&DS bookings fuel confidence.
